top_signals.title: Algorand plans ‘broad quantum resilience’ by 2027
top_signals.summary: Algorand is planning new accounts and consensus mechanisms designed to be resistant to the cryptography-breaking threat of quantum computers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Pound dips and stocks set to slip as Andy Burnham victory triggers political uncertainty
top_signals.summary: Good morning from the City AM liveblog team. Andy Burnham has secured his place in the House of Commons after a decisive by-election win in Makerfield overnight, with 54.8 per cent of the vote, well ahead of Reform’s 34.5 per cent. Top of Burnham’s to-do list is triggering a leadership challenge inside the Labour party, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
